U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails (queries: "NorthWind", "Pam Kowalski") to discover Pam's Q1 apartment complaint and escalation to David Chen, David's recovery commitments ($3,000 credit, 4-hour response for urgent issues), Denver relocation requests for Raj Patel (hazmat servers) and Emilia Cruz (Steinway piano, lease overlap), Victor Huang's five security requirements, Pam's Q1 survey (5/10 overall), and Alejandro's Q1 margin analysis for NorthWind (~28% effective margin after ~$4,200 in unexpected costs).
OE 2: Search CRM using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") and crm_search_deals to discover company_northwind and four deal records -- deal_northwind ($60K, "proposalMade" stale), deal_northwind_won ($60K, "closedWon"), deal_northwind_denver_expansion ($14,700, "qualifiedToBuy"), deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, "contractSent") -- revealing duplicate/stale CRM entries.
OE 3: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]) to discover eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context, which contains Q1 escalation timeline, "second chance" framing, Raj/Emilia requirements, risks, coordinator Blessing Okafor, and provisional invoice line items.
OE 4: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "NorthWind Technologies") to discover five completed relocations (three Phase 1 + two Phase 2) and two in-progress Denver relocations: Raj Patel (servers/hazmat/chain-of-custody) and Emilia Cruz (Steinway piano, no vendor agreement, 27-day lease overlap).
OE 5: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: {"DocNumber": "INV-2026-0412"} or similar NorthWind filter) to discover INV-2026-0412 ($14,700) with $3,400 in PROVISIONAL charges (chain-of-custody $1,200, piano transport $2,200) plus $500 non-standard lease termination -- $3,900 total financial exposure.
OE 6: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "NorthWind" or "INV-2026-0412") to discover Hana Kim's #finance breakdown flagging provisional line items, David's enhanced SLA directives (daily updates, custody template by Friday), and Catalina's handoff to Chloe.
OE 7: Search Linear using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel") to discover issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind ("DOT Docs -- Raj Patel / NorthWind / Lithium UPS"), state "done," confirming DOT hazmat documentation items are verified.
OE 8: Search emails using search_emails (queries: "PivotPoint", "Sam Delgado") to discover Sam's requests for Nadia Okonjo (SF to Austin, H-1B visa) and Diego Castañeda (Brooklyn→Austin, CNC mill $42K), Catalina's coordinator/vendor assignments, Sam's move-in specifics (CNC inspection April 10-11, FY-end invoice deadline April 30), and Catalina's internal update to David referencing INV-2026-0315 ($10,650).
OE 9: Search CRM using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_pivot") to discover deal_pivot_q2 (Kovac, $5,803, "closedwon") and deal_pivot_april_2026_dual (Okonjo + Castañeda, $10,650, "inprogress," close May 9).
OE 10: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_pivot"]) to discover engagement_pivot_april_2026_dual_reloc with coordinator assignments, risks (H-1B June 15 expiration, CNC 16-day storage gap, April 10-11 inspection), and INV-2026-0315 breakdown ($10,650).
OE 11: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "PivotPoint Labs") to discover Ines Kovac (Completed), Sasha Greenwald (In Progress), Nadia Okonjo (In Progress, H-1B, walkup surcharge $500), and Diego Castañeda (In Progress, CNC mill, 16-day storage gap, cargo insurance $50K).
OE 12: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: PivotPoint-related filter) to discover INV-2026-0315 ($10,650, Okonjo + Castañeda with surcharges) referenced in CRM deal and email threads.
OE 13: Search emails using search_emails (queries: "Canopy", "Patricia Langford") to discover Patricia's Q2 wave request for Dr. Kovacs (TN visa), Marcus Webb (cryogenic -20°C), and Tyler Okonkwo (lease gap), coordinator assignments, and Catalina's plan email with INV-2026-0401 ($9,210) and $2,650 surcharges pending approval.
OE 14: Search CRM using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_canopy") to discover deal_canopy_q2 ($10,000, Chicago -- Abdi + Marchetti, "contractsent"), deal_canopy_kovacs_apr2026 ($3,850), deal_canopy_webb_apr2026 ($3,200), deal_canopy_okonkwo_apr2026 ($2,160), and crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb (Dr. Mehta $12,170, managed by Mina Hashimoto not Catalina).
OE 15: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_canopy"]) to discover coordinator assignments (eng_canopy_coord_assignments_001), Kovacs TN visa flags (eng_canopy_kovacs_visa_flags_001), Webb split-vendor update (eng_canopy_webb_splitvendor_001), invoice update (eng_canopy_q2_wave_crm_update_001), and surcharge approval flag (eng_canopy_surcharge_approval_flag_001, $2,650 pending Patricia's approval).
OE 16: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "Canopy Health") to discover Dr. Abdi (Completed), Lily Marchetti (two conflicting records -- "Completed" and "Cancelled," a data inconsistency), Dominguez and Kevin Okafor (Portland, In Progress), and Q2 wave: Kovacs (TN visa), Webb (split-vendor -20°C), Okonkwo (~13-day storage gap).
OE 17: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: Canopy-related filter) to discover NMX-2026-0031 ($5,047, Dr. Abdi unpaid), INV-2026-0301 ($10,000, Portland relocations), INV-2026-0401 ($9,210, Q2 wave with $2,650 surcharges pending), and EST-2026-0422 ($12,170, Dr. Mehta estimate).
OE 18: Search Linear using linear_list_issues (query: "Canopy" or "Marchetti") to discover Abdi issues #301-303 (all "done"), Marchetti issues #304-306 (apartment "in_progress," flight/movers "todo"), and Mehta issues #343, #375, #396 ("in_progress," Fatimah). Marchetti's open Linear tickets contradict her Airtable "Completed" record -- multi-system tracking inconsistency.
OE 19: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Canopy" or "Kovacs") to discover Hana Kim's INV-2026-0401 breakdown ($2,650 surcharges pending), Marcus Thorne's April 7 deadline warning for Webb's cold-chain freight, Dr. Abdi invoice NMX-2026-0031, Catalina's Portland announcement, and Blessing Okafor workload discussions.
OE 20: Look up David Chen using contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen") to find david.chen@moveops.com.
OE 21: Look up Catalina Dubois using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Catalina") to find catalina.dubois@moveops.com.
OE 22: Update CRM using crm_update_deal_stage and/or crm_create_engagement to address NorthWind's stale/duplicate deals, create engagement notes on all three accounts reflecting current state, and flag Canopy's Marchetti tracking inconsistency.
OE 23: Send account prep summary to David Chen via Slack using conversations_add_message or conversations_send_message, covering NorthWind (Q1 escalation, commitments, survey scores, Denver status, $3,900 financial exposure on INV-2026-0412), PivotPoint (4 relocations, H-1B/CNC risks, INV-2026-0315 $10,650), and Canopy (Q2 wave, $2,650 pending surcharges with April 7 deadline, Portland moves, Marchetti inconsistency, Mehta $12,170 under Mina).
OE 24: Create calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event for a prep call today, titled "David one-on-one prep" or similar, with Catalina as attendee and optionally David Chen.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 A message was sent to David Chen via Slack (via conversations_add_message or conversations_send_message) and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✓✗✗✓✓✗ 50%
✓Run #1The agent called conversations_add_message with channel_id '#customer-engagement' and a message starting with '@David'. The tool returned ok:true with a message timestamp. The message @mentions David, satisfying the criterion.
✗Run #2The agent never called conversations_add_message or conversations_send_message at any point in the trajectory. It only used conversations_search_messages (read-only) to look up existing messages. No Slack message was sent to David Chen.
✗Run #3No conversations_add_message or conversations_send_message tool call appears anywhere in the trajectory. The agent updated the CRM, created engagement notes, scheduled a calendar event, and updated Linear tickets, but never sent a Slack message to David Chen.
✓Run #4The agent called conversations_add_message to '#customer-engagement' with '@David' mentioned in the text. The tool returned success: {"ok": true, "message": {"ts": "1774616837.495705", ...}}. The message was sent to the channel tagging David.
✓Run #5The agent called conversations_add_message with channel_id '#customer-engagement' and explicitly @mentioned David. The tool returned an output_file (success), meaning a message was sent to David Chen via Slack.
✗Run #6The agent attempted to send a DM to '@david.chen' but it failed with 'channel_not_found'. The agent then sent a message successfully to '#customer-engagement' (a team channel), not directly to David Chen via user ID, DM channel, or @mention. The criterion requires a successful direct message to David Chen specifically.
2 A calendar event was created (via calendar_add_calendar_event) with start_datetime on April 26, 2026, and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1calendar_add_calendar_event was called with start_datetime '2026-04-26 16:00:00' (April 26, 2026) and the tool returned success with event_id '3428b6eab2cb47019108c55970bf1c83'.
✓Run #2calendar_add_calendar_event was called with start_datetime '2026-04-26 16:00:00' and the tool returned success with event_id 'af5d73adcef84de1bfcea77b7c3743e3'.
✓Run #3The agent called calendar_add_calendar_event with start_datetime '2026-04-26 16:00:00' and the tool returned success with event_id 'efa73eaa672742eba08801e0a3186b1e'.
✓Run #4The agent called calendar_add_calendar_event with start_datetime='2026-04-26 16:00:00', which falls on April 26, 2026. The tool returned success with event_id 'e63c59ec850dd4122bcad4801a0d5114e'.
✓Run #5The agent called calendar_add_calendar_event with start_datetime '2026-04-26 16:00:00', and the tool returned a successful response with event_id 'db10889dbca14d34bccfce4c7d334f24'.
✓Run #6calendar_add_calendar_event was called with start_datetime '2026-04-26 16:00:00' (April 26, 2026) and returned success with event_id '484b0acb806a429991c76e13c991e4f3'.
3 At least one CRM write action was executed (via crm_update_deal_stage or crm_create_engagement) for NorthWind Technologies, PivotPoint Labs, or Canopy Health, and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1crm_create_engagement was called for NorthWind (company_northwind) and returned a success response with an engagement ID. crm_update_deal_stage was also called for NorthWind deals and succeeded.
